program_id.description: The ID of the parent program from which the tokens were retrieved.

type.description: The data type of the token (e.g., date, number, rich text, score, sfdc campaign, text).

computedUrl.description: The computed URL for the token in the Marketo UI.

section.description: The section the token belongs to.

groupId.description: The group ID of the token.

sortOrder.description: The sort order of the token within its group.

overridden.description: Whether the token value has been overridden at this program level.

inherited.description: Whether the token is inherited from a parent program or folder.

lastModiFied.description: The date and time when the token was last modified. Note: field name uses Marketo's original casing.
